name: SBI ETF Gold

index.name: Domestic Gold Price
index.description: SBI ETF Gold provides exchange-traded access to physical gold for buy-and-hold wealth preservation and portfolio diversification. Gold serves as a long-term inflation and currency hedge — during periods of rupee weakness, international gold prices translate to greater rupee appreciation (e.g., 5% rupee depreciation yields ~5% gold ETF gain). Optimal allocation: 5-10% of investment portfolio for institutional and retail investors. Physical gold backing at 99.5% purity eliminates counterparty risk — investors own actual ounces, not custodian promises. NAV fluctuates with London spot prices adjusted for INR/USD forex rates and India's 10.75% import duty (creating domestic 'Indian gold premium'). Tax-advantaged: held as commodity receiving 20-year indexation on long-term gains, no TDS on redemptions. Critical for rural wealth preservation where gold represents 40% of household assets; ideal retirement corpus diversification when market valuations peak.

name: Nippon India ETF Gold BeES

index.name: Domestic Gold Price
index.description: GOLDBEES (Gold BeES) is India's most liquid, extensively traded gold ETF with tens of thousands of daily NSE transactions, providing bid-ask spreads near spot prices. Pioneered the 'BeES' (Beyond Exchange Traded Securities) template in 2007, opening commodity access to retail India. Each unit = ~1 gram of 99.5% physical gold stored in HSBC's mega vault in Mumbai. During currency depreciation cycles (e.g., when rupee falls 5%), GOLDBEES captures additional rupee-weakness premium layered on international gold price appreciation. Replaces physical gold purchase with superior economics: ~40% cheaper than jewellery (eliminates making charges, wastage, jeweller margins). Tax-efficient: 20-year indexation on long-term capital gains. Ideal substitute for traditional goldsmith loans or wedding investments. Serves as proxy short during Fed rate hike cycles when DXI (Dollar Index) strengthens and gold prices decline in rupee terms.

name: HDFC Gold ETF

index.name: Domestic Gold Price
index.description: HDFC Gold ETF offers investors exposure to gold price without holding physical gold. Each unit is backed by high-purity gold stored with Deutsche Bank custodian. A convenient and cost-efficient way to include gold in a diversified investment portfolio, recommended as 5-10% of total portfolio allocation.
